visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a woman in a green long-sleeved crop top and white wide-leg trousers standing in an indoor living room. In the background, a Christmas tree decorated with ornaments and a gold 'Merry Christmas' sign is visible on the left, and a green wreath hangs on the wall behind her. She holds a white t-shirt with large blue, yellow, and turquoise polka dots, gesturing animatedly with her hands while speaking with an expressive face. (2) The scene shifts to a medium close-up of the woman's hands working on a white circular table. She holds silver scissors with yellow handles and begins cutting the bottom hem of the polka-dot shirt into thin, even vertical strips. Her movements are precise as she focuses on the fabric. On the table, various other tools and the colorful shirt are visible under bright, warm indoor lighting. (3) The camera moves to a tight close-up of the woman's hands tying the cut fabric strips into knots along the bottom edge of the shirt. She uses her fingers, which have dark brown polish, to loop and pull the fabric tight, creating a long-fringe effect at the base. The background shows the lower branches of the Christmas tree and a white shelf with various plush character toys. (4) The woman is shown folding the shirt vertically and using red dashed line overlays on the screen to indicate where to cut next. She cuts through the neck and shoulder area to create the handles for the bag. The camera uses a mix of medium shots and close-ups to capture both her facial reactions and the physical transformation of the modified garment. (5) In the final phase, she braids three strips of the remaining shoulder fabric into thick handles and ties the ends securely. The video concludes with the woman holding the finished bag up to the camera, smiling broadly and modeling it by swinging it by the handles and then wearing it over her shoulder to show its functionality.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: 太舊?. [Variety]: 捨不得丟?. [Logo]: haha baby. (2) [Slogan]: 轉掉太浪費?. [Slogan]: 想留念. (3) [Variety]: 💡. [Variety]: 教你. (4) [Slogan]: 跟著. [Slogan]: 開始. (5) [Variety]: 第一步呢. [Subtitle]: 你就先把下面. [Slogan]: 長度剪長比較好看. (6) [Subtitle]: 剪成長條一條一條的. (7) [Slogan]: 使用剪刀時務必小心. (8) [Subtitle]: 剪成這樣下擺都是鬚鬚之後呢. [Subtitle]: 接下來. [Slogan]: (上下對應打平結). (9) [Subtitle]: 不用裁縫車. [Subtitle]: 用綁的就可以. (10) [Variety]: 綁. (11) [Slogan]: 底部就完成啦. (12) [Subtitle]: 再來呢對折. [Subtitle]: 這樣對折. [Slogan]: (左右對折正面朝外). (13) [Subtitle]: 袖子對袖子的部分. [Variety]: ⚠️. [Subtitle]: 記得對好. (14) [Slogan]: 約剪袖口寬五公分處. (15) [Subtitle]: 跟著領口弧形剪下. [Slogan]: 剪下小學童背心. (16) [Subtitle]: 把這個連結處的地方剪掉. [Slogan]: 兩邊都要剪. (17) [Subtitle]: 再來呢就是把原本肩膀的這個地方. (18) [Subtitle]: 剪兩刀讓它變成三條線. (19) [Subtitle]: 上下都要剪. [Subtitle]: 所以你把它合在一起剪就好了. (20) [Subtitle]: 大概抓一下. [Subtitle]: 讓它每一個都一樣寬. [Slogan]: 三條等寬. (21) [Subtitle]: 剪完三條之後呢. [Subtitle]: 來編辮子. (22) [Subtitle]: 把上面的三條. [Subtitle]: 這樣編辮子編起來. [Slogan]: 三股編. (23) [Subtitle]: 最後一個步驟. [Subtitle]: 然後兩邊呢. [Subtitle]: 把它綁起來. [Subtitle]: 綁緊不會掉就好. (24) [Slogan]: DIY流蘇包. (25) [Subtitle]: 是不是超可愛的流蘇包包. (26) [Subtitle]: 可以手提. [Subtitle]: 那可以肩背. [Variety]: ✓手提. [Variety]: ✓肩背. (27) [Slogan]: 自製流蘇包. [Slogan]: 只要一把剪刀.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator demonstrating the DIY project.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with dark hair tied up, wearing a dark green long-sleeved crop top with 'haha baby' printed on it and white trousers.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A domestic indoor setting featuring a decorated Christmas tree on the left, a white shelf with plush toys (Mickey, Snoopy) on the right, and festive wall decorations including a green wreath.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female speaker with a high-pitched, energetic tone introduces the video project over an upbeat electronic pop BGM with a steady 4/4 drum beat and bright synthesized textures. Her vocal delivery is rapid and entusiastic, showing high emotional arousal and a friendly, professional tone. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect, similar to a digital notification chime, marks the transition to the first instructional step. The speaker's voice maintains its high-energy pace while the music continues as a consistent background bed, ensuring the voice remains the primary focus of the mix. (3) Several short, percussive 'pop' sound effects are heard as markers for new steps appear. The speaker’s voice exhibits significant pitch variability and clear articulation, while the ambient noise floor remains extremely low, indicating a controlled studio recording environment with a high signal-to-noise ratio. (4) A synthesized 'whoosh' sound effect, characterized by a fast spectral sweep, signals a transition between different cutting phases. The background music’s tempo remains constant at approximately 128 BPM, providing a strong rhythmic foundation that matches the fast-paced, social-media-native editing style of the track. (5) The audio track concludes with a final celebratory 'whoosh' sound as the completed project is revealed. The speaker’s voice reaches its peak valence as she expresses excitement. The music then undergoes a clean fade-out, ending the production without any audible digital artifacts or distortion.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Tutorial Steps -> Result Demonstration
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To teach viewers how to upcycle an old polka-dot t-shirt into a stylish and functional fringe bag using simple cutting and braiding techniques without the need for a sewing machine.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The brand 'haha baby' is featured prominently on the creator's clothing and the t-shirt used for the project, suggesting a brand-led content piece.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses high-density text overlays and sound effects to create a fast-paced, engaging tutorial typical of short-form social media content.
